title: Care for nursery plants
training_package_name: Agriculture, Horticulture and Conservation and Land Management Training Package
competent_person_statement: A competent person in Care for nursery plants demonstrates consistent performance across all elements and performance criteria in a workplace context.

elements.title: Prepare for work

pcs.text: Confirm care activities to be undertaken with supervisor
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Confirm care activities to be undertaken with supervisor?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Confirm care activities to be undertaken with supervisor.

pcs.text: Recognise potential hazards and risks and implement safe working practices to minimise risks to self and others
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Recognise potential hazards and risks and implement safe working practices to minimise risks to self and others?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Recognise potential hazards and risks and implement safe working practices to minimise risks to self and others.

pcs.text: Select appropriate tools and equipment for the task
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Select appropriate tools and equipment for the task?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select appropriate tools and equipment for the task.

pcs.text: Select fit, and use personal protective equipment and clothing applicable to the task
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Select fit, and use personal protective equipment and clothing applicable to the task?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Select fit, and use personal protective equipment and clothing applicable to the task.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E1: Prepare for work

elements.title: Maintain nursery plants

pcs.text: Follow hygiene practices to minimise risk of contamination
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Follow hygiene practices to minimise risk of contamination?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Follow hygiene practices to minimise risk of contamination.

pcs.text: Prepare and apply fertiliser according to work instructions
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Prepare and apply fertiliser according to work instructions?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Prepare and apply fertiliser according to work instructions.

pcs.text: Identify weeds and remove from pots as directed
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify weeds and remove from pots as directed?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify weeds and remove from pots as directed.

pcs.text: Block and space plants according to spacing requirements and instructions
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Block and space plants according to spacing requirements and instructions?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Block and space plants according to spacing requirements and instructions.

pcs.text: Prune plants using the required tools and safe work practices and according to instructions
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Prune plants using the required tools and safe work practices and according to instructions?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Prune plants using the required tools and safe work practices and according to instructions.

pcs.text: Stake and tie plants using the required materials and according to instructions
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Stake and tie plants using the required materials and according to instructions?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Stake and tie plants using the required materials and according to instructions.

elements.analysis_focus: Analyse evidence against Element E2: Maintain nursery plants

elements.title: Complete nursery plant maintenance operations

pcs.text: Remove and dispose of waste material according to workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Remove and dispose of waste material according to workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Remove and dispose of waste material according to workplace procedures.

pcs.text: Clean, disinfect, maintain and store tools and equipment according to workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Clean, disinfect, maintain and store tools and equipment according to workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Clean, disinfect, maintain and store tools and equipment according to workplace procedures.

pcs.text: Identify and report unserviceable tools and equipment according to workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Identify and report unserviceable tools and equipment according to workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Identify and report unserviceable tools and equipment according to workplace procedures.

pcs.text: Record and report nursery plant care and maintenance according to workplace procedures
pcs.analysis_prompt: What valid, sufficient, authentic and current evidence shows the candidate can Record and report nursery plant care and maintenance according to workplace procedures?
pcs.benchmark_statement: The candidate demonstrates that they can Record and report nursery plant care and maintenance according to workplace procedures.
